lists.0: test completed OK : default not present
lists.16: Default not yet checked by the ECU
lists.40: Default detected, confirmed but not more present

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal level out of range/zero adjustment failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component | system operation obstructed or blocked

DTCExtendedData.Mileage.comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

DiagnosticIdentificationCode.comment: Fixed value (identifies a break in the ECU diag definition)

SoftwareNumber.comment: Identifies the software version active in the ECU

EditionNumber.comment: Identifies the software version (edition) active in the ECU

HardwareNumber.LowerPart.comment: Identifies the hardware version of the ECU

Alarm_code.comment: code to be stored in world wide Renault database

Last AS operation.year.comment: Year of Last after sales operation date

TUNER1.Frequency value.comment: Frequency Tune $xxx.x, [MHz], 0.1MHz step if FM$xxxx  [KHz], 9KHz step if LW

Last AS operation.day.comment: Day of Last after sales operation date

LIN_IN.Info_Aux_IN.comment: status of auxiliary audio from an other ECU

Last AS operation.month.comment: Month of Last after sales operation date

OutputPermanentControlList.comment: Testing output : List of all output with permanent test

OutputTemporaryControlList.comment: Testing output : List of all output with temporary test

lists.1: Rotary switch decrease since last clear
Rotary switch increase since last clear

ECU Configuration.SDVC.comment: Speed dependant volume control curve configuration

SessionName.comment: This service is to allow the tool to switch the ECU into a Diagnosis session.

lists.0: Request for availibility LID from 0 to 19
lists.32: Request for availibility LID from 21 to 39

lists.4: Test Not Complete Since Last Clear

Status mask.comment: Mask of DTC status to reply with 1 byte

TUNER1.antenna field Max.comment: antenna field Max [dBuV], maximum value since start of the ECU

TUNER1.antenna field Mean.comment: antenna field Mean [dBuV], average value since start of the ECU

TUNER1.antenna field Min.comment: antenna field Min [dBuV], minimum value since start of the ECU
